author: Weijie Chen
name: VQ-VAE Weight Compression: Learned Codebook During Warmdown
blurb: Replaces scalar INT5/INT8 quantization with Vector Quantization (VQ G=2, K=1024). Per-layer codebook trained via EMA during warmdown with cosine similarity on unit sphere. Halves quantization delta vs INT5 at same bitrate. Novel compression technique not previously submitted to Parameter Golf.
compression: VQ G=2 K=1024, cosine sphere codebook, EMA=0.95, 10-bit packed indices + zstd-22
architecture: 10L x 512d, MLP 3.0x, 8H/4KV GQA, SmearGate, tied embeddings, 24.1M params
